name: fall-risk-indicator
title: Fall Risk Indicator
description: Banded fall-risk chip with a named scale, numeric score, pip meter, and assessment date.

props.name: band
props.description: The classified band. Passed in — thresholds differ by scale, so callers classify.

props.name: scale
props.description: Scale name — required so the score is interpretable.

clinicalNotes: The scale must be named: a fall-risk score is meaningless without it, because thresholds differ by instrument (Morse ranges 0–125, Hendrich II 0–16), so this component never derives the band from a bare score — the caller classifies and passes `band`. A risk score without its assessment date is stale data, so the date is surfaced alongside the score and reads "date unknown" when absent. The band is also conveyed by a three-pip meter and exposed to screen readers as text, never by color alone. Informational UI — consumers own clinical validation and re-assessment cadence.
notes: medcn-original. Pip-meter pattern shared with allergy-badge; band is required (no per-scale threshold guessing).
